ManagedAttribute.displayName: Read and write your organization's external identities policy [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the application to read and update the organization's external identities policy without a signed-in user. For example, external identities policy controls if users invited to access resources in your organization via B2B collaboration or B2B direct connect are allowed to self-service leave.
Read and write your organization's external identities policy [on] Microsoft Graph
